violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Observed dried food inside microwave and inside freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed doors and sides of appliances and faucet at hand sink need to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed acoustic ceiling tiles in food prep area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors in food prep area need to be cleaned.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Observed handle of ice scoop in ice.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed bare wood shelf in food prep area.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed ceiling is acoustic tile, which is neither a smooth, nor cleanable surface.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
